mapper.insert: insert into announcement_read_records (announcement_id, user_id, user_type, read_time) values (#{announcementId}, #{userId}, #{userType}, NOW())
mapper.select: select count(*) from announcement_read_records where announcement_id = #{announcementId}
mapper.insert:
insert into announcement_read_records (announcement_id, user_id, user_type, read_time) values
(#{record.announcementId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.userType}, NOW())
